title: Yosys aborts with exception in peephole optimizers pass

features.name: comparison result assigned to multi-bit register
features.description: Code should include a comparison expression (==) whose 1-bit result is stored in a multi-bit register wider than 1 bit

features.name: part-select of register used as shift amount
features.description: Code should include a single-bit part-select (e.g. [1:1]) on a multi-bit register that is then used as the shift amount in a shift-right operation

features.name: constant shifted by part-select of comparison result register
features.description: Code should include a shift-right of a constant literal by a part-select of a register that was assigned a comparison result, creating a dataflow chain from comparison through part-select into shift
